nodes.name: distributed/mod.rs
nodes.summary: Distributed coherence root module: Raft-based multi-node coordination wiring adapter, config, and state machine into a DistributedCoherence engine.

nodes.name: DistributedCoherence
nodes.summary: Main distributed coherence engine combining Raft consensus with a coherence state machine for replicated tracking.

nodes.name: DistributedError
nodes.summary: Errors for distributed coherence operations: leader/quorum, replication, timeout, configuration failures.

nodes.name: CoherenceStatus
nodes.summary: Aggregated coherence status combining energy, incoherent region count, and cluster health.

nodes.name: distributed/state.rs
nodes.summary: Replicated CoherenceStateMachine with node states, edge energies, incoherent regions, checkpoints, and snapshots.

nodes.name: NodeState
nodes.summary: Per-node distributed state vector with last-update timestamp.

nodes.name: EdgeEnergy
nodes.summary: Edge energy with bounded history buffer and trend/stability analysis.

nodes.name: IncoherentRegion
nodes.summary: Tracks a flagged incoherent region by id, member node set, and activation state.

nodes.name: Checkpoint
nodes.summary: Periodic snapshot summary of total energy, edge count, and incoherent count at a Raft index.

nodes.name: CoherenceStateMachine
nodes.summary: Replicated state machine applying CoherenceCommand entries to local maps and checkpoints.

nodes.name: ApplyResult
nodes.summary: Result variants from applying a Raft command to the state machine.

nodes.name: StateSummary
nodes.summary: Compact summary of state machine: indices, counts, total energy.

nodes.name: StateSnapshot
nodes.summary: Full serializable snapshot of node states, edge energies, and incoherent regions for restore.

nodes.name: error.rs
nodes.summary: Centralized error taxonomy: Coherence, Substrate, Computation, Governance, Execution, and Storage error enums with Result aliases.

nodes.name: CoherenceError
nodes.summary: Top-level coherence engine error variants.

nodes.name: SubstrateError
nodes.summary: Errors for the substrate (graph/sheaf) layer; auto-converts from bincode codec errors.

nodes.name: ComputationError
nodes.summary: Errors from computational kernels (matrices, residuals, solvers).

nodes.name: GovernanceError
nodes.summary: Governance error variants for policy bundles, witnesses, and lineage at the crate-error root.

nodes.name: ExecutionError
nodes.summary: Errors from the action execution ladder and coherence gate.

nodes.name: StorageError
nodes.summary: Storage layer errors with serde_json conversion.

nodes.name: events.rs
nodes.summary: Domain event types and metadata records emitted across coherence, substrate, governance, and execution.

nodes.name: DomainEvent
nodes.summary: Comprehensive enum of domain events flowing through the prime-radiant event bus.

nodes.name: EventMetadata
nodes.summary: Envelope metadata (timestamps, correlation ids) attached to every domain event.

nodes.name: EventRecord
nodes.summary: Pairing of a DomainEvent with its metadata for persistence and replay.

nodes.name: execution/action.rs
nodes.summary: Action abstraction for the execution ladder: ids, scope, metadata, impact, context, trait, and results.

nodes.name: ActionId
nodes.summary: UUID-backed identifier for individual actions.

nodes.name: ScopeId
nodes.summary: Logical scope identifier limiting an action's blast radius.

nodes.name: ActionImpact
nodes.summary: Quantified impact (energy/scope/reversibility) used by the coherence gate.

nodes.name: ActionMetadata
nodes.summary: Descriptive metadata: name, description, tags, author, lane hints.

nodes.name: ExecutionContext
nodes.summary: Runtime context provided to an Action during execution (lane, timeouts, witness).

nodes.name: Action
nodes.summary: Core trait every executable action implements (Send+Sync, async-style execute).

nodes.name: ActionError
nodes.summary: Errors surfaced by an Action implementation.

nodes.name: ActionResult
nodes.summary: Outcome record for a completed action including impact, timing, and lane info.

nodes.name: execution/executor.rs
nodes.summary: ActionExecutor: schedules actions through the coherence gate, tracks lanes, statistics, and human-review queue.

nodes.name: ExecutorConfig
nodes.summary: Configuration knobs for ActionExecutor (timeouts, queues, lane gating).

nodes.name: ExecutorStats
nodes.summary: Counters for executed/aborted/escalated actions by lane.

nodes.name: HumanReviewItem
nodes.summary: Queued action awaiting human approval after gate escalation.

nodes.name: ExecutionResult
nodes.summary: Generic execution result wrapping an action's typed Output with metadata.

nodes.name: ExecutionStats
nodes.summary: Per-execution timing and energy stats.

nodes.name: ActionExecutor
nodes.summary: Concurrent action executor driving the ladder with parking_lot RwLock state and tracing.

nodes.name: ActionResultBuilder
nodes.summary: Fluent builder for ActionResult instances.

nodes.name: execution/gate.rs
nodes.summary: CoherenceGate: evaluates an Action's impact against energy snapshots and policy bundles to decide lane assignment or rejection.

nodes.name: PolicyBundleRef
nodes.summary: Lightweight reference to a governance policy bundle used at gate-evaluation time.

nodes.name: WitnessId
nodes.summary: UUID-backed witness identifier scoped to the execution gate.

nodes.name: EnergySnapshot
nodes.summary: Snapshot of system energy used to gate an action.

nodes.name: GateDecision
nodes.summary: Decision returned by CoherenceGate (allow/escalate/reject) with rationale.

nodes.name: WitnessRecord
nodes.summary: Witness record produced alongside a gate decision for audit.

nodes.name: EnergyHistory
nodes.summary: Rolling history of energy snapshots used for trend-based gating.

nodes.name: CoherenceGate
nodes.summary: Gate that evaluates actions against thresholds and emits witness records.

nodes.name: execution/ladder.rs
nodes.summary: Compute lane ladder definitions, thresholds, escalation reasons, and transitions.

nodes.name: ComputeLane
nodes.summary: Enumerated compute lanes (e.g., fast/standard/heavy) governing action execution.

nodes.name: LaneThresholds
nodes.summary: Threshold configuration per lane (energy/impact bounds).

nodes.name: ThresholdError
nodes.summary: Errors from invalid threshold configuration.

nodes.name: EscalationReason
nodes.summary: Why an action was escalated to a higher lane.

nodes.name: LaneTransition
nodes.summary: Record of moving an action between lanes with reason.

nodes.name: execution/mod.rs
nodes.summary: Execution module barrel re-exporting Action, Gate, Ladder, and Executor public API.

nodes.name: governance/lineage.rs
nodes.summary: Lineage tracking: records, operations, entity references, and per-entity lineage tracker.

nodes.name: LineageId
nodes.summary: UUID-backed lineage record identifier.

nodes.name: EntityRef
nodes.summary: Typed reference to a governed entity used in lineage records.

nodes.name: Operation
nodes.summary: Operation kinds (create/update/delete) recorded in lineage.

nodes.name: LineageError
nodes.summary: Errors raised by the lineage subsystem.

nodes.name: LineageRecord
nodes.summary: Hash-chained lineage record tying an operation to entities and witnesses.

nodes.name: LineageBuilder
nodes.summary: Fluent builder for LineageRecord values.

nodes.name: EntityLineageTracker
nodes.summary: Maintains lineage chains indexed by entity.

nodes.name: governance/mod.rs
nodes.summary: Governance root: shared Hash/Timestamp/Version primitives and re-exports for policy, witness, lineage, repository.

nodes.name: Hash
nodes.summary: 32-byte content hash (blake3-compatible) used throughout governance.

nodes.name: Timestamp
nodes.summary: UTC timestamp wrapper with chrono interop.

nodes.name: Version
nodes.summary: SemVer-style version with parse/display.

nodes.name: GovernanceError
nodes.summary: Top-level governance error enum aggregating policy, witness, lineage errors.

nodes.name: governance/policy.rs
nodes.summary: Policy bundle data model: ids, status, approvals, thresholds, escalation rules, builder.

nodes.name: PolicyBundleId
nodes.summary: UUID identifier for a versioned policy bundle.

nodes.name: PolicyBundleRef
nodes.summary: Reference to a policy bundle by id and version hash.

nodes.name: PolicyBundleStatus
nodes.summary: Lifecycle status (draft, active, retired) of a policy bundle.

nodes.name: ApproverId
nodes.summary: Identifier for a policy approver (string-backed).

nodes.name: ApprovalSignature
nodes.summary: Signed approval attached to a policy bundle.

nodes.name: ThresholdConfig
nodes.summary: Threshold configuration for approvals and escalation.

nodes.name: EscalationRule
nodes.summary: Rule mapping a condition to an escalation action.

nodes.name: EscalationCondition
nodes.summary: Conditions triggering policy escalation (energy/time-based).

nodes.name: PolicyError
nodes.summary: Errors raised when manipulating policy bundles.

nodes.name: PolicyBundle
nodes.summary: Full policy bundle: rules, thresholds, approvals, and lifecycle state.

nodes.name: PolicyBundleBuilder
nodes.summary: Fluent builder constructing validated PolicyBundle values.

nodes.name: governance/repository.rs
nodes.summary: Repository traits and in-memory implementations for policies, witnesses, and lineage records.

nodes.name: QueryOptions
nodes.summary: Pagination/ordering options for governance repository queries.

nodes.name: TimeRange
nodes.summary: Inclusive time-range filter used by repository queries.

nodes.name: PolicyRepository
nodes.summary: Trait abstracting CRUD/query operations over policy bundles.

nodes.name: WitnessRepository
nodes.summary: Trait abstracting witness record storage and retrieval.

nodes.name: LineageRepository
nodes.summary: Trait abstracting lineage record storage and traversal.

nodes.name: InMemoryPolicyRepository
nodes.summary: In-memory PolicyRepository implementation for tests and embedded use.

nodes.name: InMemoryWitnessRepository
nodes.summary: In-memory WitnessRepository implementation.

nodes.name: InMemoryLineageRepository
nodes.summary: In-memory LineageRepository implementation.

nodes.name: governance/witness.rs
nodes.summary: Witness chain primitives: WitnessRecord, GateDecision, EnergySnapshot, ComputeLane (governance-scope), and chain builder.

nodes.name: WitnessId
nodes.summary: Governance-scope UUID witness identifier.

nodes.name: ComputeLane
nodes.summary: Governance-scope ComputeLane mirror used inside witness records.

nodes.name: GateDecision
nodes.summary: Persisted gate decision recorded in a witness.

nodes.name: EnergySnapshot
nodes.summary: Persisted energy snapshot stored inside a witness record.

nodes.name: WitnessChainError
nodes.summary: Errors validating or extending the witness chain.

nodes.name: WitnessError
nodes.summary: General witness subsystem errors.

nodes.name: WitnessRecord
nodes.summary: Hash-chained witness record linking gate decisions to policy bundles.

nodes.name: WitnessChainBuilder
nodes.summary: Builder constructing and validating a chain of WitnessRecord values.

nodes.name: gpu/buffer.rs
nodes.summary: GPU buffer abstractions: typed graph data structs, GpuBuffer wrapper, manager, pool, and usage flags.

nodes.name: BufferUsage
nodes.summary: Enumerated GPU buffer usage categories.

nodes.name: GpuNodeState
nodes.summary: Pod/Zeroable node-state struct uploaded to GPU.

nodes.name: GpuEdge
nodes.summary: Pod/Zeroable edge record for GPU buffers.

nodes.name: GpuRestrictionMap
nodes.summary: Pod/Zeroable restriction map used by sheaf attention kernels.

nodes.name: GpuParams
nodes.summary: Uniform parameter buffer shared across compute kernels.

nodes.name: GpuBuffer
nodes.summary: Owned wgpu::Buffer wrapper with descriptor metadata.

nodes.name: GpuBufferManager
nodes.summary: Manages allocation/reuse of named GPU buffers per kernel.

nodes.name: BufferUsageFlags
nodes.summary: Bitset wrapper around wgpu BufferUsages.

nodes.name: BufferKey
nodes.summary: Cache key identifying pooled buffers by size + usage.

nodes.name: GpuBufferPool
nodes.summary: Reuse pool for transient GPU buffers.

nodes.name: PoolStats
nodes.summary: Statistics describing pool hit/miss/eviction counts.

nodes.name: gpu/device.rs
nodes.summary: wgpu device/adapter wrapper with capability info and options.

nodes.name: GpuDeviceInfo
nodes.summary: Descriptor of the chosen wgpu adapter (name, backend, limits).

nodes.name: GpuDevice
nodes.summary: Initialized wgpu Device/Queue/Adapter trio used by the GPU engine.

nodes.name: GpuDeviceOptions
nodes.summary: Knobs for requesting a GPU device (power preference, features).

nodes.name: gpu/dispatch.rs
nodes.summary: Command-encoder driven dispatch with reusable pipeline cache and a builder for binding groups.

nodes.name: DispatchConfig
nodes.summary: Dispatch sizing and timing configuration.

nodes.name: GpuDispatcher
nodes.summary: Schedules compute pipelines against a GpuDevice with pooled buffers.

nodes.name: DispatchBuilder
nodes.summary: Builder accumulating bindings and workgroup counts for a single dispatch.

nodes.name: gpu/engine.rs
nodes.summary: GpuCoherenceEngine: end-to-end GPU pipeline for coherence energy over a SheafGraph using kernels and buffer manager.

nodes.name: GpuConfig
nodes.summary: Configuration for the GPU coherence engine.

nodes.name: GpuCapabilities
nodes.summary: Detected GPU capabilities (max workgroup size, features).

nodes.name: GpuCoherenceEnergy
nodes.summary: GPU-side counterpart of CoherenceEnergy with conversion helpers.

nodes.name: GpuCoherenceEngine
nodes.summary: Top-level GPU engine orchestrating buffer upload, kernel dispatch, and readback.

nodes.name: gpu/error.rs
nodes.summary: GpuError enum with conversions from wgpu request/async errors.

nodes.name: GpuError
nodes.summary: Comprehensive GPU error variants for device/buffer/pipeline failures.

nodes.name: gpu/kernels.rs
nodes.summary: Concrete compute kernels: residuals, energy, sheaf attention, and token routing with their parameter Pod structs.

nodes.name: ComputeResidualsKernel
nodes.summary: Kernel computing per-edge residuals on the GPU.

nodes.name: ComputeEnergyKernel
nodes.summary: Kernel computing total coherence energy via reductions.

nodes.name: EnergyParams
nodes.summary: Pod parameter struct for the energy kernel.

nodes.name: SheafAttentionKernel
nodes.summary: Attention kernel weighted by sheaf restriction maps.

nodes.name: AttentionWeight
nodes.summary: Pod attention weight record.

nodes.name: TokenRoutingKernel
nodes.summary: Kernel routing tokens to compute lanes based on energy thresholds.

nodes.name: Token
nodes.summary: Pod token record consumed by the routing kernel.

nodes.name: RoutingDecision
nodes.summary: Pod routing decision output by the routing kernel.

nodes.name: LaneStats
nodes.summary: Aggregated per-lane statistics after routing.

nodes.name: gpu/mod.rs
nodes.summary: GPU module barrel: re-exports buffer/device/dispatch/engine/error/pipeline plus shader and workgroup helpers and global constants.

nodes.name: gpu/pipeline.rs
nodes.summary: ComputePipeline + PipelineCache (DashMap-backed) and binding descriptor types for kernel construction.

nodes.name: BindingType
nodes.summary: Enumerated binding types (storage/uniform/read-only) for compute pipelines.

nodes.name: BindingDesc
nodes.summary: Descriptor for a single binding slot in a compute pipeline.

nodes.name: ComputePipeline
nodes.summary: Wrapper around a wgpu compute pipeline with layout metadata.

nodes.name: PipelineCache
nodes.summary: DashMap-based cache for reusable compiled compute pipelines.
